title: Kitchen Perfected 4-in-1 Snack Maker, makes perfect Toasties, Waffles, Omelettes and Paninis, 3 interchangeable easy clean non-stick cooking plates, locking latch, black - E2731
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: INTERCHANGEABLE: The 4 in 1 Snack maker comes with three interchangeable top and bottom waffle, panini and toasted sandwich/omelette grill plates.

EASY CLEAN NON-STICK: The plates are produced with a non-stick coating to release the snacks without tearing or crumbling and to make cleaning easy with no scrubbing. NOTE: DO NOT USE METAL UTENSILS OR HARSH CLEANING PADS WHICH MAY DAMAGE THE COATING.
SIMPLE OPERATION: With power and ready indicator lights, easy to remove plates and a locking latch, the snack maker is simple and safe to operate.
LOW ENERGY CONSUMPTION: It has 800W power and large 21 x 11cm plates for thick toasted sandwiches, omelettes or waffles and tasty paninis up to 19 cm long.
RECIPES: Includes free recipe ideas to make tasty snacks and lunches that all the family will love.
description: This Kitchen Perfected 4 in 1 Snack Maker is extremely versatile. The 3 fully removeable and easy to clean non-stock plates allow you to quickly and conveniently make a variety of savoury or sweet snacks, from delicious toasties, to scrumptious waffles, fluffy omelettes or mouth watering panini's. You can even make sweets such as apple turnovers etc. Package includes: 1x Grill Unit 1x Set of 2 Waffle Plates 1x Set of 2 Sandwich Plates 1x Set of 2 Panini Grill Plates 1x Instruction Manual
